name: libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64
title: libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64
summary: C++ bittorrent library by Rasterbar Software
description:
C++ bittorrent library by Rasterbar Software
Bittorrent library by Rasterbar Software (Arvid Norberg).
libtorrent-rasterbar is a C++ library that aims to be a good alternative to
all the other bittorrent implementations around.
.
The main goals of libtorrent-rasterbar are:
* to be cpu efficient
* to be memory efficient
* to be very easy to use
.
This package contains libtorrent-rasterbar run time shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64 because C++ bittorrent library by Rasterbar Software.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtorrent-rasterbar2.0t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
